description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design. The front facade features large, grid-style windows and a recessed main entryway, flanked by symmetrical window arrangements. The rear of the house opens onto a fenced green yard, with sliding glass doors providing access to the outdoor space. A detached garage is positioned to one side, connected by a short walkway, and there is a small patio or utility area adjacent to the garage. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, and the overall structure emphasizes straight lines and functional geometry. The house is surrounded by a wooden fence, enclosing the backyard for privacy.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a fenced backyard. Features include a detached garage, sliding glass doors, and a clean, rectangular design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical windows, and the detached garage to the right.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the garage, fenced backyard, and a small patio or utility area.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the fenced green yard, sliding glass doors, and the rear facade of the house.
description_view_3: Side view showing the long, windowed wall and the full extent of the backyard fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with large windows, no porch, and a simple, clean-lined entry.
